mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, category_id AS categoryId, learning_year AS learningYear, learning_month AS learningMonth, item_name AS itemName, learning_time_minutes AS learningTimeMinutes, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM learning_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND learning_year = #{learningYear} AND learning_month = #{learningMonth} ORDER BY category_id, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_records ( user_id, category_id, learning_year, learning_month, item_name, learning_time_minutes ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{learningYear}, #{learningMonth}, #{itemName}, #{learningTimeMinutes} )
